footer.description: Obesight AI is an artificial intelligence-based health screening tool to detect obesity risk early and provide healthy lifestyle recommendations.
footer.disclaimer_text: This tool is designed for educational and initial awareness purposes, not as a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or clinical treatment from a doctor.
footer.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Obesight AI. All Rights Reserved.

hero.title: Predict Your Obesity Risk Smartly
hero.subtitle: Obesight analyzes your daily habits with a machine learning model to detect obesity risk. Get instant results and personalized nutritional recommendations.

mission.text: Obesight analyzes your physical profile, eating habits, hydration level, and daily activities in an integrated manner through 17 health factors to detect obesity risk and construct a personalized lifestyle action plan.

features.title: Smart Solutions For You
features.card1_desc: A user-friendly 4-step quick questionnaire to map your daily habits accurately.
features.card2_desc: Uses a trained LightGBM classification model to detect obesity risk level.
features.card3_desc: Get personalized recommendations to improve your diet, hydration, and daily activities in a targeted manner.

how_it_works.title: Start in 3 Easy Steps
how_it_works.step1_desc: Take 1 minute to answer basic questions about your lifestyle and physical profile.
how_it_works.step2_desc: We process your data instantly using our machine learning model.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Get a comprehensive risk report and personalized action advice immediately.

about.title: Artificial Intelligence Behind Obesight
about.subtitle: Obesight uses a machine learning classification model to detect obesity risk levels based on daily behavior survey data, designed as a fast, informative, and easy-to-understand initial screening tool.

dataset.title: Training Dataset
dataset.subtitle: The data source that trained the prediction model
dataset.description: The model is trained using the Obesity Dataset. A survey dataset mapping demographic factors, eating habits, and lifestyle against a person's obesity level.

model_info.title: Model Metadata
model_info.subtitle: Technical details of the prediction model used
model_info.name: Model Name
model_info.failed_metadata: Failed to load model metadata from server. Please reload the page.

cta.title: Ready to discover your risk?
cta.subtitle: Complete the quick screening and get your personalized health insights.

wizard.title: Obesity Screening Form
wizard.subtitle: Fill in honestly for the most accurate analysis results. Your data is processed locally and instantly.
wizard.api_connection_error: Failed to connect to API server. Please check if the backend server is running.

step_metadata.title: Basic & Physical Data
step_metadata.desc: Enter your basic profile information and body anthropometric measurements.

step_metadata.title: Diet & Genetics
step_metadata.desc: Questions regarding family history and your daily food consumption behavior.

step_metadata.title: Hydration & Activity Habits
step_metadata.desc: Questions regarding exercise levels, daily hydration, and your calorie awareness.

step_metadata.title: Daily Lifestyle
step_metadata.desc: Final step regarding daily screen-time, alcohol consumption, and your transportation.

questions.name: Full Name
questions.family_history: Does any family member have a history of obesity?
questions.favc: Do you frequently consume high-calorie food (fast food, fried food)?
questions.fcvc: How often do you consume vegetables in your main meals?
questions.ncp: How many main meals do you have daily?
questions.caec: Do you snack frequently between main meals?
questions.ch2o: How much water do you drink daily?
questions.scc: Do you monitor the calorie intake of the food you consume daily?
questions.faf: How many days a week do you perform physical activity or exercise?
questions.tue: How many hours do you spend in front of a gadget/computer screen daily?
questions.calc: How often do you consume alcoholic beverages?
questions.mtrans: What is the primary mode of transportation you use for daily travel?

validation.min_age: Age must be at least 1 year old
validation.min_height: Height must be at least 50 cm
validation.min_weight: Weight must be at least 10 kg

result.title: Health Analysis Results
result.subtitle: AI analysis detects risk category and provides customized health recommendations for you.
result.greeting_body: , here is the summary of your physical evaluation and personalized recommendations.
result.confidence_desc_part1: The model classifies your condition with a confidence level of
result.confidence_desc_part2: . Use the recommendations below as an initial step, not a substitute for medical diagnosis.
result.action_plan_desc: Check the items you want to prioritize this week.
result.no_specific_recs: No specific recommendations. Your current lifestyle habits are excellent!
result.update_results_desc: Re-run the screening anytime after your lifestyle habits change.
result.prob_subtitle: How close your physical condition is to each weight category according to the machine learning model.
